text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is in the middle of her warm-up for
today's training session, but something seems off.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Strange, my body's not moving the way I want...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... Yes! I'm fine, and there's nothing to
worry about.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Is it all right if I take a break, though? I'm sure a
little rest is all I need!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her bravado, I can see she's exhausted. I
should make changes to her racing schedule so
she can rest.
